Shravana

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Timur distributes gifts from his grandson, the Prince of Multan, from a Zafar-nama (Book of Victories)
by Shravana
Mughal India, court of Akbar (reigned 1556–1605) · 1598–1600 · Gum tempera, ink, and gold on paper
←Yao Shou Xianyu Shu→
